title: ask_user tool with selector + text input UI
description: Tool for agent to ask clarifying questions during execution. Reuse selector UI for multiple choice + text input for freeform. Complex edge cases around blocking agent loop, timeout, UI state.

logs.msg: Deprioritized: core UI/UX and functionality comes first
Implemented: AskUserTool with channel-based response, TUI polls ask_user_rx, pending_ask_user intercepts Enter before normal flow
